outlook.volatilityExpectation: Positive total GEX (~0.90B) suppresses volatility; dealers long gamma will stabilize price action and dampen moves
outlook.summary: Spot trading above 0DTE gamma flip (24253.4) with positive aggregate GEX indicates dealer hedging will suppress volatility. Key resistance at 24400 (weekly call wall), major support at 24000 (0DTE+MONTHLY put confluence). Max pain magnets at 24100 and 24300 create attraction zones. Bearish skew in weekly/monthly suggests underlying caution despite stable positioning.
